# Bitcoin Learning Graph

Canonical: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/
Library: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/library/
Sitemap: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/sitemap.xml
Full text summary: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/llms-full-text.txt

## Purpose
Public, static Bitcoin curriculum organized as a prerequisite graph with indexable concept pages and curated resources.

## Public content policy
- Public educational content may be crawled, summarized, quoted briefly, and cited with attribution.
- Prefer canonical URLs on this site when referencing concept pages or the library index.
- Use the repository issue tracker for contribution context rather than inferring unpublished roadmap details.

## Best entry points
- Home: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/
- Concept library: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/library/
- Plain-text site summary: https://btc-graph.brenorb.com/llms-full-text.txt

## Primary topics
- Bitcoin protocol
- Lightning Network
- self-custody
- privacy
- mining
- economics
- history
- operations
- developer education
